channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Israeli Cabinet Considers Lebanon Ceasefire Amid Regional Diplomatic Efforts
item.description: Israel’s security cabinet is set to meet to discuss a potential ceasefire with Lebanon after more than five weeks of conflict with Hezbollah, which intensified following the US-Israel confrontation wi...

item.title: PCO refers three Facebook pages to DOJ over alleged fake posts on President Marcos’ health status
item.description: The Presidential Communications Office (PCO) has filed complaints and sought legal action against three Facebook accounts accused of spreading false information about the health of President Ferdinand...

item.title: Modernist Scarborough Bluffs Home Emphasizes Light, Views, and Natural Materials
item.description: This article explores a modernist residence by Williamson Williamson Inc. perched on the Scarborough Bluffs, designed to integrate natural light, the surrounding landscape, and the homeowners’ artisti...

item.title: AAP accuses Raghav Chadha of backing BJP as ED raids AAP MP Ashok Mittal ahead of Punjab polls
item.description: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) has launched a sharp attack on its own Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha, accusing him of colluding with the BJP‑led Centre after he was accorded Z‑category security and the Enfor...

item.title: DFA Awaits Formal Report on Cyanide Found in Chinese Boats Near Ayungin Shoal for Possible Diplomatic Action
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) announced on Wednesday that it is waiting for the official laboratory results from the analysis of substances recovered from Chinese fishing boats in Ayungin Sh...

item.title: Effective strategies for IT certification preparation and practical use of exam dumps
item.description: For professionals wey dey IT sector, certification na one big deal wey show say person sabi the technical mata well. As technologies like cloud computing, cybersecurity, and networking dey grow, compa...

item.title: NHC tenants in Arusha request more time after receiving 90-day evacuation notice
item.description: A disagreement has erupted between tenants and the National Housing Corporation (NHC) in Arusha after the state housing agency issued a 90-day eviction notice. The NHC informed about 90 tenants along ...

item.title: Shaheryar Chishti Takes Charge as Chairman of K-Electric Board
item.description: K-Electric, the major power utility in Pakistan, has officially appointed Shaheryar Chishti as the new chairman of its board of directors. This decision was confirmed in a disclosure to the Pakistan S...

item.title: Zendaya and Sydney Sweeney Maintain Distance at Euphoria Premiere Amid Long-Standing Tensions
item.description: At the Los Angeles premiere of the third series of HBO's Euphoria, Zendaya reportedly arrived an hour late to avoid interaction with co-star Sydney Sweeney, reflecting ongoing tensions between them. W...

item.title: South African towns that capture the charm of Tuscany
item.description: South Africa has several picturesque towns that offer the charm and ambiance of the Tuscan countryside, making Italian-style escapes possible without leaving the country. The romantic allure of the re...

item.title: Overview of Key Developments in Selected Canadian Small-Cap Stocks
item.description: Canada's small-cap market has shown notable growth, with the S&P/TSX Small Cap Index up roughly 80 per cent over the past year. Aurora Cannabis has acquired Safari Flower Company for $26.5 million, ad...

item.title: Madonna to release a sequel to her 2005 album Confessions on a Dance Floor
item.description: Madonna is preparing a major return to the music scene with the announcement of her new album, Confessions II, set for release on 3 July. This album will serve as a follow-up to her 2005 Grammy-winnin...

item.title: Fictional case studies in pediatric journals cited in thousands of academic papers
item.description: The original news article reports that a significant number of pediatric journals published fictional case studies, which were subsequently cited in over 2,000 academic papers. This raises serious con...

item.title: Tembo Nickel and Tanzania Government Discuss Expansion in Mining Sector

item.title: Bengali New Year Procession in Kolkata Faces EC Denial; Organisation Proceeds Regardless
item.description: On April 15, 2026, a Bengali nationalist group, 'Bangla Pokkho', raised concerns after the Election Commission (EC) reportedly refused permission for their 'Poila Baisakh' (Bengali New Year) processio...

item.title: Delhi Court Summons Robert Vadra and Others in Haryana Land Deal Money Laundering Case
item.description: On Wednesday, a Delhi court summoned businessman Robert Vadra, husband of Congress leader Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, along with eight others in connection with a money laundering case related to alleged i...

item.title: Trump indicates potential nearing end of Iran conflict as peace talks may resume in Pakistan
item.description: US President Donald Trump has suggested that the war with Iran may be approaching its conclusion, stating in recent interviews that the conflict is 'close to over'. He hinted that peace talks could re...

item.title: Islamabad Bar Association to discuss sentence suspension pleas of Imaan and Hadi after large lawyer petition
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad Bar Association (IBA) has called a meeting of its general body on April 21 following a resolution signed by around 400 lawyers urging an urgent hearing of the sentence suspens...

item.title: Opposition INDIA Bloc Rejects Proposed Delimitation Bill
item.description: On April 15, 2026, All India Congress Committee (AICC) President and Rajya Sabha Leader of Opposition Mallikarjun Kharge stated that the INDIA bloc has concluded discussions on the Delimitation Bill a...

item.title: Nigeria’s Headline Inflation Rises Slightly to 15.38% in March 2026
item.description: Nigeria dey experience small increase for headline inflation as e climb to 15.38% for March 2026, show say e don increase small from 15.06% wey e reach for February. National Bureau of Statistics (NBS...
